text.title: Work Breakdown Structure Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observable signals (node name shape, weight sum, leaf hours, depth balance, overhead presence, prior-id collision) to a concrete action with rule reference.

conclusion.verdict: reject node; re-prompt for noun phrase
add missing overhead branch(es) before proceeding to decompose product branches

branch.when: verb_named == false AND overhead_complete == true AND weight_ok == false

conclusion.verdict: identify the missing/duplicate scope; decompose again until sum reaches 100

branch.when: verb_named == false AND overhead_complete == true AND weight_ok == true AND leaf_size_ok == false

conclusion.verdict: split leaves > 80h; merge leaves < 8h; never consolidate to fit a target count

branch.when: verb_named == false AND overhead_complete == true AND weight_ok == true AND leaf_size_ok == true AND id_collision == true

conclusion.verdict: refuse renumbering; pick the next available id; preserve append-only invariant

branch.when: verb_named == false AND overhead_complete == true AND weight_ok == true AND leaf_size_ok == true AND id_collision == false

conclusion.verdict: emit Dictionary entry for every leaf with included/excluded scope + AC + owner + 8-80 hours + dependencies
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: "User Management Module" → noun → all 6 overhead present → L1 weights sum 100 → L2 leaves 8-80 → no id collisions → Dictionary required for 3.2 (Search Functionality).
